indicators.name: counter
indicators.rationale: The counter is too high for comfortable keyboarding and mouse use.

indicators.name: stools
indicators.rationale: Stools are not suitable for prolonged computer work due to their lack of back support and ergonomic design.

indicators.name: marble floor
indicators.rationale: Marble floors can be slippery and difficult to walk on for extended periods, affecting comfort and productivity.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: Low lighting levels may lead to eye strain and reduced visibility, making it less suitable for computer work.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: An open layout with high foot traffic can be distracting and noisy, reducing focus and productivity.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). While there are some positive aspects such as the presence of a counter and stools, the negative factors like the high counter, low lighting, and open layout outweigh these benefits, making it less than ideal for focused solo work.
